About

Who we are

Studio Raaav is an independent game studio founded by Raaavula. The goal is to build small, charming indie games and share the journey publicly through devlogs.

No big team, no big budget — just honest craft, careful design, and a love for the kinds of games that make you feel cozy and calm.

Games

Current project

In Development

Paw &
Order

A cozy wild-west adventure where you play as a tiny sheriff cat bringing justice to the backyard frontier.
